subject: Zoom video is black in meeting
description: Camera LED on but others see black tile; preview in Zoom settings also black.

ts_steps.title: Select camera
ts_steps.action: Zoom → Video — choose correct camera; turn off HD if bandwidth low.

ts_steps.title: Close other apps
ts_steps.action: Quit apps that may lock camera (other meeting tools, camera utilities).

ts_steps.title: Driver
ts_steps.action: Device Manager — update/roll back camera driver; disable 'Enable GPU acceleration' in Zoom Video advanced.

internal_information: Exclusive access conflict, bad driver, or GPU decode issue. Test with webcam in Camera app first.
